name: Maze Quest
short_description: Maze Quest is a VR-based maze exploration game.
detailed_description:
Explore the mysterious and challenging hand-drawn starry sky maze, where you need to find the source of the music. Once you get close to the source, you will be able to enter the next level. Each maze layer is unique, and as you delve deeper, the complexity of the maze and the changing music will offer you a completely new experience.

  • 20 layers of hand-drawn starry sky mazes.

  • Choose from two different colored pens and freely draw any pattern.

  • The music will gradually intensify as you approach the source.

  • Your progress is saved after each level, allowing you to continue from the last completed layer next time.

It is recommended to play with headphones for the best experience. Supports keyboard and mouse controls.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
